title: Emoticon cache hardening
summary: Stops the emoticon catalog and local emoticon image assets from looking like fresh server loads on every chat-page visit by enabling cacheable catalog responses, versioned local image URLs, and long immutable caching for versioned emoticon assets.
validation: python -m py_compile routes_main.py routes_admin_tools.py interactive_setup.py emoticon_catalog.py server_init.py
manual_test: Open /chat once and confirm /api/emoticons/catalog and /emoticons/*.gif load normally.
Reload /chat normally and confirm catalog/images show from browser memory/disk cache instead of new server transfers.
Do not test with DevTools Disable cache enabled because that intentionally bypasses browser caching.
